One additional factor contributing to why we might prefer avoiding excessively high specific gravity involves bio-compatibility; lighter materials often integrate better with oral tissues, potentially reducing long-term complications like mucositis compared to denser bases which could irritate soft tissue more easily. Thus, my agreement stands firm given these supplementary insights into bio-compatible benefits and updated material sciences.***
